description: KNOWN DISCREPANCY (tracked in known-discrepancies.json): a non-empty dep_class_gap_annotation is attached to notes[] on both sides (INV-07 — advisory only, never enters arithmetic), but with different formatting. TS's resolveControlState does notes.push(`dep_class_gap: ${annotation}`); Python's _attach_annotation does cs.notes.append(diagnostics.dep_class_gap_annotation) with no prefix at all.
